categories.label: Track Position
categories.description: Points based on your final position on the race track (can be negative if behind start)

categories.label: Gold Doubloons
categories.description: Each gold doubloon in your cargo holds is worth 1 point

categories.label: Treasure Cards
categories.description: Total point value of all treasure cards collected (positive treasures)

categories.label: Cursed Treasures
categories.description: Negative points from cursed treasure cards

win_condition: Player with the highest total score wins. Tiebreaker goes to the player furthest along the track.
